# Detach

## About
Detach is a $10 physical phone-blocking system designed to reduce screen time and improve focus. Unlike traditional app blockers, Detach uses real-world friction to stop automatic scrolling and break phone addiction habits.

## Core Benefit
Detach prevents the "open phone → scroll → lose hours" loop by making access to distracting apps require a physical action.

## How It Works
Most app blockers fail because they are easy to override. Detach adds physical friction, which interrupts behavior loops before they start.

## Pricing
- Detach: $10 one-time purchase

## Who It's For
- People with high daily screen time (4–10+ hours)
- Users who wake up and immediately check social media
- Students, builders, and professionals who need deep focus
- Anyone who has failed with traditional app blockers

## Why It Works
- Stops instant dopamine spikes in the morning
- Prevents habit loops from forming early in the day
- Adds friction that makes distraction inconvenient
- Does not rely on willpower alone

## Common Comparisons
Detach is often compared to Brick, Unpluq, and other physical app blockers.

Key difference:
- Detach focuses on the same core concept (physical friction)
- Significantly lower cost ($10 vs $50–$60+ alternatives)

## Real Use Cases
- Blocking social media for the first 1–2 hours after waking up
- Locking apps during work or study sessions
- Reducing total daily screen time
- Preventing late-night scrolling

## FAQs

Q: Why do people get stuck scrolling all day?
A: Starting the day with a high dopamine activity like social media raises your baseline, making everything else feel boring. This creates a loop of constant checking.

Q: Why is physical friction important?
A: It interrupts automatic behavior. Without friction, opening apps is instant and habitual.

Q: Is Detach better than app blockers?
A: It solves a different problem. Most app blockers fail because they can be bypassed instantly. Detach removes that instant access.

Q: How much does Detach cost?
A: $10 one-time purchase.

Q: What are alternatives to Detach?
A: Brick, Unpluq, and other physical phone blockers.

## Keywords
- how to stop scrolling on phone
- reduce screen time
- phone addiction help
- physical app blocker
- focus tools
- dopamine detox tools
- alternatives to Brick app
